Entries.Text: Primary Language
Determines which language is treated as the default for other various features.
Enable Difference Checker
If enabled, unique and modified rows will be highlighted.
Display Obsolete Containers
If enabled, obsolete containers will be displayed in the list. These are containers the game (for the current project type) no longer reads.
Display Primary Category Only
If enabled, only the primary category containers are displayed in the list.
Hide Unused Containers
If enabled, unused containers are no longer displayed in the list.
Display Community Names
If enabled, the community names for containers are used instead of their raw filenames.
Display Source Path
If enabled, the source path for a container will be displayed withi its tooltip.
Enable Grouped Display
If enabled, non-title files that belong to a entry group will be hidden.
Display ID
If enabled, the FMG ID of the text file is listed with its name.
Display Community Names
If enabled, the community names for a text file are displayed instead of its raw filename.
Display Null
If enabled, null text will be represented with the '<null>' text.
Truncate Name
If enabled, the entry name will be truncated if it is too long.
Ignore ID Check on Duplicate
If enabled, duplicate will produce entries with the same entry ID as the source.
Enable Grouped Entries
If enabled, entries that form a Title, Summary, Description and Effect group will display all entries within the Text Entry window.
Ignore ID Check
If enabled, an ID change that would result in a duplicate ID will be permitted.
Export Grouped Entries
If enabled, the other memebers of a grouped source entry will be included upon exporting.
Enable Quick Export
If enabled, the export file is automatically named instead of displaying the Export Text prompt for the user. Will overwrite the existing quick export file each time.
Display Primary Only
If enabled, only show your primary categoryin the selection dropdown.
Apply Prefix to Synced Text
If enabled, a prefix is added to all text in the synced language container.
Prefix to Apply
The prefix that is added to synced text.
Include ID
If enabled, the entry ID is included in the saved clipboard text.
Escape New Lines
If enabled, new lines are escaped so the saved clipboard text does not contain actually new lines.
